name: Levi Jackson Wilderness Road Park
description: Levi Jackson Wilderness Road Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in London, KY. There are 3 outdoor asphalt, hard, and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Whitley Branch Veterans Park
description: Come play pickleball at Whitley Branch Veterans Park in London, KY! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The courts are free.
